title: feat(pi): add Observational Memory integration for Pi agent framework
summary: Adds @mastra/pi package (integrations/pi/) providing Observational Memory (OM) integration for the Pi agent framework (pi-agent-core and pi-coding-agent). Includes createMastraOM() for core usage and a full pi-coding-agent extension with lifecycle hooks and diagnostic tools. Also adds a shared OM integration layer in @mastra/memory/integration (new entry point). Deletes the examples/assistant-ui example and adds examples/pi. 61 tests with InMemoryMemory and mock observer models (no API keys). Modifies packages/memory (new integration subpath export), integrations/opencode (refactored to use shared integration), and e2e bundle test config.
maintainerNotes: PR has merge conflicts (CONFLICTING state) and CI is failing (Full Test Suite + MCP Package Tests fail, Tool Builder Tests pending). Changeset check was skipped — no changeset file included. A non-member (zackleman) requested changes asking about compatibility with Pi's tree storage format — the comment is substantive but the reviewer is not an org member. Maintainer DanielSLew approved on Feb 17. The PR touches @mastra/memory by adding a new 'integration' subpath export with shared OM helpers — this is a cross-package change that warrants careful review. The assistant-ui example deletion appears unrelated to the Pi integration and should be verified as intentional. Author needs to rebase to resolve conflicts, fix CI failures, and add a changeset.
